summary: Auto-managed GitHub Agentic Workflows tracking issue for threat detection warnings and failures in agentic workflow runs; not a user-reported SkiaSharp technical issue.

reproEvidence.environmentDetails: Created by github-actions[bot]; auto-managed by GitHub Agentic Workflows infrastructure

analysis.summary: Issue #4416 is an automatically created and managed tracking issue generated by GitHub Agentic Workflows (gh-aw) to collect threat detection warnings and failures across agentic workflow runs. The body explicitly states 'Do not close this issue manually' and 'No action to take - Do not assign to an agent.' It is not a user-reported SkiaSharp bug, feature request, or question — it is CI/automation infrastructure metadata.

codeInvestigation.finding: GitHub Agentic Workflows compiled workflow file found; uses gh-aw v0.71.5 to run agentic triage tasks. The workflow infrastructure manages the [aw] tracking issues automatically.

keySignals.text: This issue is automatically managed by GitHub Agentic Workflows. Do not close this issue manually.
keySignals.interpretation: Auto-managed infrastructure issue — should remain open; no manual action required.

keySignals.text: No action to take - Do not assign to an agent.
keySignals.interpretation: The issue explicitly requests no triage action be taken.

analysis.rationale: Classified as type/question under area/Build because the issue is an automated CI/infrastructure tracking mechanism, not a real user-reported SkiaSharp defect or enhancement request. The closest available type label is type/question; the closest area is area/Build since it relates to CI workflows. Suggested action is keep-open because the issue body explicitly prohibits closure and is self-managed by automation.

proposals.title: Keep issue open as auto-managed tracker
proposals.description: No action needed. This issue is automatically managed by GitHub Agentic Workflows and tracks threat detection events. It should remain open for the automation system to post to.

resolution.recommendedProposal: Keep issue open as auto-managed tracker
resolution.recommendedReason: The issue body explicitly states it should not be closed and is auto-managed.

actionability.reason: Auto-managed GitHub Agentic Workflows tracking issue. The body explicitly states 'Do not close this issue manually' and 'No action to take - Do not assign to an agent.' It is infrastructure metadata, not a triageable SkiaSharp issue.
